nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Grand rhabdornis
nodes.summary: Grand rhabdornis（Grand rhabdornis，学名 Rhabdornis grandis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联1个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park
nodes.summary: Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联29种鸟类，包括Rufous coucal、Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo等29种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park actual protection from habitat loss and deforestation is lax

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical mid-elevation and high elevation montane forest. The International Union for Conservation of Nature lists it as a Least-concern species but despite this the population is still said to be declining due to habitat loss and fragmentation from illegal logging, land conversion, slash-and-burn farming and mining

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical mid-elevation and high elevation montane forest. The International Union for Conservation of Nature lists it as a Least-concern species but despite this the population is still said to be declining due to habitat loss and fragmentation from illegal logging, land conversion, slash-and-burn farming and mining

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical mid-elevation and high elevation montane forest. The International Union for Conservation of Nature lists it as a Least-concern species but despite this the population is still said to be declining due to habitat loss and fragmentation from illegal logging, land conversion, slash-and-burn farming and mining
